title: agrimonia eupatoria var. humilis
intro: Agrimonia eupatoria var. humilis, also known as low-growing agrimony or creeping agrimony, is a low-growing perennial herb in the family Rosaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic compounds, and has been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Agrimonia eupatoria var. humilis include reducing fever, alleviating menstrual cramps, and soothing digestive issues, as well as promoting wound healing and reducing inflammation. Agrimonia eupatoria var. humilis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a versatile and accessible remedy for those seeking natural health solutions.
